div.p: The Security Council discussed the Palestine question on October 19. Mr. Bunche made an appeal to the Council to end the fighting that had been raging in the Negeb (SC, 3rd yr, No. 118, page 2).
The text of the Central Truce Supervision decision in Case No. 12 is printed in SC, 3rd yr., Supplement for October 1948, page 62.
